Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration

Class Modifier

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.Modifier
All Implemented Interfaces:
ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Abstract, AnnotationUseSpecification, Final, Ghost, Model, Native, NoState, Static, StrictFp, Synchronized, Transient, TwoState, VisibilityModifier, Volatile
public abstract class Modifier extends JavaProgramElement
Modifier. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
